name: com.ondrejvaic.steeringai
description: High-performance framework for steering, flocking and group behaviors, built with Unity ECS, Jobs, and Burst. Includes custom editor, 15+ ready-to-use behaviors, and samples.

samples.description:
Contains 9 documented sample scenes, and several cutscenes.

For documentation, see:
https://steeringai.ondrejvaic.com/docs/category/samples.
